info.title: Slybroadcast API
info.description: Slybroadcast provides a ringless voicemail delivery service. The API allows sending voicemail campaigns, managing campaigns (pause, resume, stop, cancel), retrieving campaign results and reports, managing audio files, and maintaining a Do Not Dial list. All campaign and management requests go to the /vmb.php endpoint via POST with form data. Different operations are distinguished by the c_option or other parameters in the request body. Requires TLS 1.1 or higher.

post.description:
Unified endpoint for all campaign operations. The operation performed depends on the parameters sent:

- **Send campaign**: Provide c_phone, c_callerID, c_date, and audio source (c_record_audio or c_url+c_audio)
- **Pause campaign**: Set c_option=pause with session_id
- **Resume campaign**: Set c_option=run with session_id
- **Stop campaign**: Set c_option=stop with session_id
- **Cancel campaign**: Set c_option=cancel with session_id
- **Get call status**: Set c_option=callstatus with session_id and c_phone
- **Get campaign results**: Set c_option=campaign_result with session_id
- **Get campaign reports**: Set c_option=campaign_reports with c_ctype
- **Get campaigns by date**: Set c_option=campaign_by_date with date
- **Add to Do Not Dial**: Set c_option=do_not_dial with c_phone
- **Remove from Do Not Dial**: Set c_option=remove_do_not_dial with c_phone
- **Get remaining credits**: Set remain_message=1

c_option.description: Operation to perform on a campaign or list.

session_id.description: Campaign session ID. Required for pause, run, stop, cancel, callstatus, and campaign_result operations.

c_record_audio.description: Name of a previously recorded audio file (case-sensitive). Used when sending a campaign. Provide this OR c_url, not both.

c_url.description: URL of an external audio file. Must be URL-encoded. Used when sending a campaign.

c_audio.description: Audio file type when using c_url.

c_phone.description: Comma-separated list of phone numbers. For sending: max 10,000 per submission. Also used with callstatus, do_not_dial, and remove_do_not_dial.

c_callerID.description: Valid phone number to display as caller ID. Required when sending a campaign.

c_date.description: Scheduled date/time in Eastern Time, 24-hour format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS. Use 'now' for immediate delivery. Required when sending a campaign.

mobile_only.description: Set to 1 to send only to mobile numbers.

c_dispo_url.description: Webhook URL for delivery status callbacks. Endpoint must return 'OK' to acknowledge receipt. Callback format: campaign_id|destination|dispoCode|dispoText|delivery_time|carrier

c_endtime.description: Campaign stop time: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS (Eastern Time, 24-hour).

c_ctype.description: Campaign type filter for campaign_reports operation.

date.description: Date filter for campaign_by_date operation, format: YYYY-MM-DD.

remain_message.description: Set to 1 to retrieve remaining message credits.

200.description:
Operation result. Format varies by operation:
- Send campaign: 'OK session_id=<ID> number of phone=<count>'
- Campaign results: pipe-delimited lines with Session ID|Call To|Status|Reason|Delivery Time|Carrier
- Remaining credits: 'remaining messages=<count> pending messages=<count>'
- Other operations: status text

post.description: Retrieves a list of all uploaded audio files, optionally including duration.

c_method.description: Method to call. get_audio_list returns names only; get_audio_list_with_duration includes duration in seconds.

post.description: Downloads a specific audio file by its 5-digit code and system filename.

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Send and manage ringless voicemail campaigns, retrieve results, and manage Do Not Dial lists.

tags.name: Audio
tags.description: List and download audio files for voicemail campaigns.
